Short: Allergy intolerance model
Definition: EHDS refined base model for allergy/intolerance

Short: Common header for all patient-related data
Definition: Common header for all patient-related data

Short: Subject
Definition: Patient/subject information

Short: Business identifier for the object
Definition: Business identifier for the object

Short: Authorship
Definition: Resource authoring details

Short: Author
Definition: Author(s) by whom the resource was/were authored. Multiple authors could be provided.

Short: Date and time of authoring/issuing
Definition: Date and time of the issuing the document/resource by its author.

Short: Date and time of the last update to the resource
Definition: Date and time of the last update to the document/information

Short: Status of the resource
Definition: Status of the resource

Short: Reason for the current status of the resource.
Definition: Reason for the current status of the resource.

Short: Language
Definition: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

Short: Version
Definition: Business version of the resource.

Short: A narrative easy-to-read representation of the full data set, e.g. PDF-version of a document
Definition: A narrative easy-to-read representation of the full data set, e.g. PDF-version of a document

Short: Agent or allergen that causes the reaction
Definition: A specific allergen or other agent/substance (drug, food, chemical agent, etc.) to which the patient has an adverse reaction propensity.
Binding Description: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.24 **eHDSIActiveIngredient** (ATC, used in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.61 eHDSISubstance (EMA SMS, used in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.19 eHDSIAllergenNoDrug (SCT, used in MH@EU); ICD-11 Non-drug allergens

Short: Type of propensity describes whether this condition refers to an allergy, non-allergy intolerance, or unknown class of intolerance (not known to be allergy or intolerance)
Definition: Type of propensity describes whether this condition refers to an allergy, non-allergy intolerance, or unknown class of intolerance (not known to be allergy or intolerance)
Binding Description: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.18 eHDSIAdverseEventType (SCT, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-type (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

Short: Textual description of the allergy or intolerance
Definition: Textual description of the allergy or intolerance

Short: Potential risk for future life-threatening adverse reactions when exposed to a substance known to cause an adverse reaction.
Definition: Potential risk for future life-threatening adverse reactions when exposed to a substance known to cause an adverse reaction.
Binding Description: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.57 eHDSICriticality (HL7, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergy-intolerance-criticality (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

Short: Assertion about the certainty associated with a propensity, or potential risk, of a reaction to the identified substance. Diagnostic and/or clinical evidence of condition.
Definition: Assertion about the certainty associated with a propensity, or potential risk, of a reaction to the identified substance. Diagnostic and/or clinical evidence of condition.
Binding Description: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.58 eHDSIAllergyCertainty (HL7, used in MH@EU) ; http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-verification (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

Short: Clinical status of the allergy or intolerance (e.g. active, inactive, resolved)
Definition: Clinical status of the allergy or intolerance (e.g. active, inactive, resolved)
Binding Description: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.59 eHDSIAllergyStatus (HL7, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-clinical (HL7, required in HL7 FHIR)

Short: Date of onset of allergy, e.g., date of the first observation of the reaction. Partial date could be used.
Definition: Date of onset of allergy, e.g., date of the first observation of the reaction. Partial date could be used.

Short: Date of resolution of the allergy (e.g. when the clinician deemed there is no longer any need to track the underlying condition)
Definition: Date of resolution of the allergy (e.g. when the clinician deemed there is no longer any need to track the underlying condition)

Short: Description of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction including date of manifestation and severity. Example: anaphylactic shock, angioedema (the clinical manifestation also gives information about the severity of the observed reaction).
Definition: Description of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction including date of manifestation and severity. Example: anaphylactic shock, angioedema (the clinical manifestation also gives information about the severity of the observed reaction).

Short: Clinical symptoms/signs associated with the event
Definition: Clinical symptoms/signs associated with the event
Binding Description: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.5 eHDSIIllnessandDisorder (ICD-10, alternative in MH@EU); 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.11 eHDSIReactionAllergy (SCT, alternative in MH@EU); ICD-11

Short: Date and time of allergy manifestation
Definition: Date and time of allergy manifestation

Short: Severity of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction.
Definition: Severity of the clinical manifestation of the allergic reaction.
Binding Description: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12559.11.10.1.3.1.42.13 eHDSISeverity (SCT, used in MH@EU); http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/reaction-event-severity (HL7, Required in HL7 FHIR)

Short: Description of the event as a whole
Definition: Description of the event as a whole

Short: Date of the observation of the reaction
Definition: Date of the observation of the reaction
